mapper.select: SELECT en.*, e.title AS eventTitle, e.event_date AS eventDate, e.location AS eventLocation, u.username AS username, u.real_name AS realName FROM enrollments en LEFT JOIN events e ON en.event_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON en.user_id = u.id WHERE en.id = #{id}

SELECT en.*, e.title AS eventTitle, e.event_date AS eventDate, e.location AS eventLocation, u.username AS username, u.real_name AS realName FROM enrollments en LEFT JOIN events e ON en.event_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON en.user_id = u.id WHERE en.user_id = #{userId} AND en.event_id = #{eventId}

SELECT en.*, e.title AS eventTitle, e.event_date AS eventDate, e.location AS eventLocation, u.username AS username, u.real_name AS realName FROM enrollments en LEFT JOIN events e ON en.event_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON en.user_id = u.id WHERE en.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT en.*, e.title AS eventTitle, e.event_date AS eventDate, e.location AS eventLocation, u.username AS username, u.real_name AS realName FROM enrollments en LEFT JOIN events e ON en.event_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON en.user_id = u.id WHERE en.event_id = #{eventId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND status = 'enrolled'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enrollments (event_id, user_id, enroll_time, status) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{userId}, #{enrollTime}, #{status})
